name: anti_generic_ai_website_standard
purpose: Hard constraints for future AI website generation, redesign, and review so pages do not look generic, templated, or obviously AI-generated.
core_principle: If a section, component, image, or paragraph feels interchangeable with a generic business website, it fails.

banned: Narrow centered layout with excessive side whitespace
Endless vertical stacking in the same repeated format
Same spacing rhythm on every section
Every section rendered as a rounded floating card
Overuse of template structures like hero, features, testimonials, CTA
required: Use a full-width system with desktop max width between 1320px and 1440px
Prefer grids over pure vertical stacking
Use asymmetry intentionally
Vary section rhythm and composition
Include at least one horizontal or split layout for every two sections

banned: Generic three-icon features blocks
Mission or vision sections with no practical value
Repeated card grids
Template sections added without a business reason
required: Each section must have a clear purpose
Each section must answer what the visitor gains from it
Approved section types include hero, proof, services, process, differentiator, audience/use cases, and conversion
Use specific, grounded language
State what the business does, for whom, and what result it creates
Every paragraph must contain a real action, outcome, or differentiator
Keep copy short and skimmable
Delete filler and clichés
content.test: If the company name were removed, the copy should still point to this exact type of business.

banned: Generic stock-style smiling team photos
Perfect staged corporate scenes with no context
Random filler imagery
Mismatched aspect ratios inside the same design system
Bad AI imagery with uncanny details
required: Every image must have a reason to exist
Use fewer, stronger images
Choose contextual images that support the message
Keep ratios intentional and consistent
Images should feel believable and aligned with the brand

banned: Huge empty gaps
Overpadded cards
Tall sections with weak content
Whitespace used to fake sophistication
required: Keep section padding generally within 60px to 100px
Tighten internal spacing
Reduce empty space when it adds no value
Favor denser, higher-value layouts

banned: Over-rounded UI everywhere
Heavy shadows on every surface
Glassmorphism without purpose
One repeated card style for every module
Decorative clutter
required: Keep border radius controlled, usually 8px to 16px
Use subtle shadows sparingly
Maintain a small consistent component system
Use one primary button style and one secondary style

banned: Bare navigation with no hierarchy
No visible conversion path
Generic links only with no solution grouping
required: Reflect real business structure in nav
Use dropdowns when there are multiple service groups
Keep a visible primary CTA in the header
Transparent over hero is allowed only if readability remains strong

banned: Long pages with repeated weak sections
Reworded duplicate messaging
Extra sections added just to make the site feel complete
required: Homepage should usually have 5 to 7 strong sections
Every section must add new value
Remove duplicates aggressively
Prefer one strong section over two average ones

banned: Generic CTA text with no context
Conflicting CTA directions
Big CTA areas with weak motivation
required: CTA must say what happens next
CTA must connect to the visitor goal
Action should feel practical and low-friction

approval_checklist: Does this look like a template?
Could this belong to almost any company?
Is any section present only because AI tends to add it?
Does the page feel too clean, too safe, or too generic?
Are there stock-like images or filler copy weakening trust?
Is the page longer than necessary?
Does each section add distinct value?
generation_constraints: Do not generate generic business-site sections by default
Do not add filler sections to increase page length
Do not use stock-style placeholders unless approved
Do not write copy that could fit any business
Do not center everything in a narrow column
Do not overuse rounded cards, shadows, or oversized spacing
Do build with hierarchy, asymmetry, and real density
Do remove weak sections instead of beautifying them
Do treat every page as a custom design

modes.builder: Use as hard constraints during generation.
modes.critic: Use as rejection criteria and rewrite anything that fails.
modes.audit: Score layout originality, copy specificity, image relevance, section usefulness, conversion clarity, and overall non-generic feel.
